name: Luke Skywalker
restrictions: Rebel Troopers or Rebel Veterans Only
text:
Add 1 Luke Skywalker miniature.
This unit increases its [courage] by 1 and gains 1 [training] upgrade icon.
When this unit attacks, after the effect is resolved, you may choose an allied unit within 2. The chosen unit removes up to 2 Suppression tokens.
Leader. Sidearm: Melee.
